visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long black hair, wearing a white turtleneck sweater and a black vest, stands in a brightly lit warehouse-style retail environment. She holds a transparent plastic container filled with small, green, grape-sized fruits. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. (2) The camera remains relatively static as the woman gestures towards the fruit container. She holds it up closer to the lens, showing the green fruits inside. In the background, other shoppers move through the aisles between large industrial shelves. (3) The scene cuts to a woman wearing a blue beret and a white puffer vest holding the same fruit container in a different part of the warehouse, near refrigerated milk shelves. She smiles and points at the container. (4) The camera zooms in slightly on the product label which reads 'MUNCH'N'. The woman continues to hold the container and gestures with her hands while looking towards an off-camera person.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 這個是. (2) [Variety]: 紐西蘭 迷你奇異果. [Subtitle]: 紐西蘭迷你奇異果. (3) [Subtitle]: 也太小了吧. (4) [Subtitle]: 這是我看過最小的奇異果哎. (5) [Subtitle]: 小不隆咚. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個不知道可不可以直接吃. (7) [Subtitle]: 他說要轉軟的時候才能吃. [Variety]: 才能吃. (8) [Subtitle]: 429元. [Variety]: 429元. (9) [Subtitle]: 吃法就是一定要等他軟了才行. [Variety]: 吃法就是一定要等他軟了才行. (10) [Subtitle]: 不然的話會很澀. [Variety]: 會很澀. (11) [Subtitle]: 然後還有要剝他的皮哦. [Variety]: 然後還有要剝他的皮哦. (12) [Subtitle]: 算是一個辛苦的小水果. [Variety]: 辛苦的小水果. (13) [Subtitle]: 他看起來有點像那個檳榔. (14) [Subtitle]: 非常可愛.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 3 shoppers in background, and 1 child in a cart.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a white sweater with a black vest; the second has a blue beret and a white puffer vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and refrigerated food sections with large 'MILK' signs in Chinese.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high pitch and energetic arousal, introducing a product. Background contains an upbeat acoustic guitar melody with a steady 4/4 beat. Ambient warehouse hum is barely audible. (2) The female voice continues at a high speech rate, expressing surprise at the small size of the fruit. Vocal intensity increases slightly. (3) A male voice briefly interjects with a questioning tone. The female speaker responds immediately with a playful, informative explanation about how to eat the fruit, noting it must be soft and peeled. (4) The audio concludes with a positive, conclusive summary about the cuteness of the fruit, with the BGM remaining consistent until the fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Observation -> Practical Information -> Evaluation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a consumer guide and product spotlight for mini kiwi berries found at Costco. It captures the initial surprise at the product's small size, provides specific preparation advice (waiting for ripeness and peeling), and lists the price to inform potential buyers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While the Costco logo is prominent and the product brand is shown, the video tone is that of an organic vlog review rather than a paid commercial endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles with large text overlays and upbeat music to maintain high engagement.
